zh.Harewood Manor, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾希亞活 曼諾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Ryther II於1379年出生在英國越可爾盧黑時，他的父親Sir William Ryther I30歲，母親Dame Sibyl Aldeburgh14歲。他於大約1404年與Maud Umfraville在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1440年10月1日在英國越可爾希亞活享年61歲，埋葬在英國越可爾希亞活。

zh-hans.Harewood Manor, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾希亞活 曼諾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Ryther II于1379年出生在英国越可爾盧黑时，他的父亲Sir William Ryther I30岁，母亲Dame Sibyl Aldeburgh14岁。他于大约1404年与Maud Umfraville在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1440年10月1日在英国越可爾希亞活享年61岁，埋葬在英国越可爾希亞活。

nameMeanings.name: Ryther
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of German Reither, a variant of Reiter .

variants.name: Reiter
meanings: occupational name for a mounted soldier or knight, from Middle Low German rider, Middle High German rīter ‘rider’. It is also found in some central European countries, e.g. in Czechia and Slovenia. Compare Raiter .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Ryther II was born in 1379, in Ryther, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir William Ryther I, was 30 and his mother, Dame Sibyl Aldeburgh, was 14. He married Maud Umfraville about 1404, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 1 October 1440, in Harewood, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 61, and was buried in Harewood, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Ryther II est né en 1379, à Ryther, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Ryther I, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Dame Sibyl Aldeburgh, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Maud Umfraville environ 1404, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 1 octobre 1440, à Harewood, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Harewood, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Ryther II 1379 in Ryther, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Ryther I 30 und seine Mutter Dame Sibyl Aldeburgh 14. Er hat um 1404 in Yorkshire, England Maud Umfraville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 1. Oktober 1440 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Harewood, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Harewood, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Ryther II è nato il nel 1379 nel Ryther, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir William Ryther I, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Dame Sibyl Aldeburgh, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Maud Umfraville circa 1404, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 1 ottobre 1440, nel Harewood, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Harewood, Yorkshire, England.

ja.Ryther, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアリスエル
ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Ryther IIが1379年にイギリスヨークシュアイアリスエルで生まれた時，父Sir William Ryther Iは30歳，母Dame Sibyl Aldeburghは14歳であった。約1404年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでMaud Umfravilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1440年10月1日にイギリスヨークシュアイアハーエウッドで61歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアハーエウッドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Ryther II(이)가 1379년 영국 요르크실르 리터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Ryther I(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Dame Sibyl Aldeburgh(은)는 14세였다. 그는 대략 1404년 영국 요르크실르에서 Maud Umfraville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1440년 10월 1일 영국 요르크실르 하레우드에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 하레우드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Ryther II nasceu em 1379, em Ryther, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Ryther I, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Dame Sibyl Aldeburgh, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Umfraville aproximadamente 1404, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1 de outubro de 1440, em Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Ryther II родился в 1379 г. в местности ритир, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Ryther I было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Dame Sibyl Aldeburgh, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Umfraville около 1404 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 1 октября 1440 г. в местности харюуд, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности харюуд, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Ryther II nació en 1379, en Ryther, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Ryther I, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Dame Sibyl Aldeburgh, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Maud Umfraville aproximadamente 1404, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 1 de octubre de 1440, en Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
